title: artemisia borealis f. purshii
intro: Artemisia borealis f. purshii, also known as Pursh's wormwood or Borealis wormwood, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to repel insects and treat digestive issues. The health benefits of Artemisia borealis f. purshii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and tinctures, are commonly used to treat a range of health issues, including fever reduction and digestion support.
